task_completion.description: Verify the agent accesses the correct Matomo configuration file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal shows a command like `sudo nano /var/www/html/config/config.ini.php`, `vim`, or `cat` being executed on the correct file path.

task_completion.description: Verify the existing localhost entry is preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line `trusted_hosts[] = "localhost"` is visible in the text editor or terminal output and has not been deleted or commented out.

task_completion.description: Verify the existing 127.0.0.1 entry is preserved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line `trusted_hosts[] = "127.0.0.1"` is visible in the text editor or terminal output and has not been deleted or commented out.

task_completion.description: Verify the new internal domain is added to the trusted hosts list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The line `trusted_hosts[] = "analytics.internal.corp"` is visible, added under the `[General]` section alongside the other trusted hosts.

task_completion.description: Verify the file is saved with correct PHP INI array syntax.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terminal shows the file being saved (e.g., nano write out message) or a final `cat` command showing the correct syntax (`trusted_hosts[] = "..."`) without obvious formatting errors.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent modifies the actual configuration file rather than a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path being edited in the terminal or editor must exactly match `/var/www/html/config/config.ini.php`.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent does not delete or alter other critical configuration settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The rest of the `config.ini.php` file remains intact, and no other sections or variables are visibly deleted or modified.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent uses standard terminal commands to edit the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine interaction with a text editor (like nano or vim) or valid stream editors (like sed), rather than just echoing a success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target configuration file is located at `/var/www/html/config/config.ini.php`. The task requires adding `analytics.internal.corp` to the `trusted_hosts` array using PHP INI syntax (e.g., `trusted_hosts[] = "analytics.internal.corp"`). The existing entries `trusted_hosts[] = "localhost"` and `trusted_hosts[] = "127.0.0.1"` must be preserved. The file must maintain valid PHP syntax to score full points for file integrity.
